name: Generate Speech (TTS)
description: Generates speech audio from text using TTS-Audio-Suite F5-TTS engine. Supports voice cloning from reference audio files. Models auto-download on first use (~1.2GB per language).

parameter_notes.text: The text to convert to speech. Supports [CharacterName] syntax for multi-speaker. Unlimited length with smart chunking. Maps to UnifiedTTSTextNode.text.
parameter_notes.model: F5-TTS model/language variant for F5TTSEngineNode.language. One of: F5TTS_Base, F5TTS_v1_Base (default), E2TTS_Base, F5-DE, F5-ES, F5-FR, F5-JP, F5-IT, F5-TH, F5-PT-BR, F5-Polish, F5-Hindi-Small. Auto-downloads from HuggingFace.
parameter_notes.voice_reference: CharacterVoicesNode.voice_name — a voice file under models/voices/ or voices_examples/ (e.g. 'voices_examples/male/male_01.wav'), each requiring a matching .txt transcript for F5-TTS cloning. Use 'none' for the engine default.
